abstract: USB.h User-Space  IOUSBFamily error codes  kIOUSBPipeStalled MacrokIOUSBPipeStalledMac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.0+#define kIOUSBPipeStalledDiscussionErrors specific to the IOUSBFamily. Note that the iokit_usb_err(x) translates to 0xe0004xxx, where xxx is the value in parenthesis as a hex number.

Macro# kIOUSBPipeStalled

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.0+

```
#define kIOUSBPipeStalled
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/iokit/kiousbpipestalled#discussion)

Errors specific to the IOUSBFamily. Note that the iokit_usb_err(x) translates to 0xe0004xxx, where xxx is the value in parenthesis as a hex number.
